name: Hermes Dev Container
postCreateCommand: cd frontend && npm install && cd .. && pre-commit install && service postgresql start && su postgres -c "createdb hermes 2>/dev/null || true" && { [ -f backend/.env ] || cp backend/.env.example backend/.env; } && set -a && . backend/.env && set +a && su postgres -c "psql -c \"ALTER USER $POSTGRES_USER PASSWORD '$POSTGRES_PASSWORD';\""
